name: Video games as stimuli in neuroimaging studies: a minireview
subtitle: Blank et al., 2026

salience-insula.label: Anterior Insula / Salience
salience-insula.source: as defined in paper: anterior insula (AI) responses to unfair offers, defection, and contextually appropriate behaviors

acc-cingulate.label: Anterior Cingulate Cortex
acc-cingulate.source: as defined in paper: dorsal ACC activated during violent scenes; rostral ACC suppressed; posterior cingulate cortex identified for attack intent prediction

dmn.label: Default Mode Network
dmn.source: as defined in paper: DMN activated during overly easy tasks (boredom); medial prefrontal activity during wins/losses; precuneus activated during violent scenes

cen-control.label: Cognitive Control / CEN
cen-control.source: as defined in paper: DLPFC active during flow state (cognitive control); inferior/superior parietal cortex active during competition, flow, and navigation

tom-network.label: Theory of Mind Network
tom-network.source: as defined in paper: temporoparietal junction activated during violent scenes; theory of mind network central for prediction of attack intents
